org.docgene.model

Class XMLFallbackArticle

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent
      • org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParentArticle
        • org.docgene.model.XMLFallbackArticle
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Article, FallbackArticleType, org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement, org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement, HTMLOutput, XMLParent, XMLParentArticle

    public class XMLFallbackArticle
extends AbstractXMLParentArticle
implements FallbackArticleType
    Represents a fallback article.
